title: MEGACells Texture Backport
body:
UNOFFICIAL Backport of MEGACells 1.21 textures

REQUIRES LATEST VERSION OF 1.20.1 MEGACells FOR DRIVE MODELS TO WORK

Also requires [AE2 TEXTURE BACKPORT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ae2-texture-backport) for some item models and screens to look correct.

---

This pack backports the MEGACells 1.21 textures to 1.20.1.

This also fixes an incompatibility between MEGACells and the AE2 Texture Backport, so the MEGA interface can be opened.
